name: auth.consentLookup
description: Look up details for a pending consent request using its user code. Returns the current status, requested scopes, and approval/denial information.

user_code.description: The user-facing code displayed during device authorization (e.g., 'ABCD-EFGH'). Case-insensitive, hyphens optional.

status.description: Current status of the consent request.

client_id.description: OAuth client that initiated the request.

created_at.description: When the consent request was created.

verification_uri.description: URL where the user can enter the code.

approved_at.description: When the request was approved (if status is APPROVED).

denied_at.description: When the request was denied (if status is DENIED).

denied_reason.description: Reason provided when request was denied.

errors.description: The specified user code does not exist or has expired.
The user code format is invalid.
